nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Swift coding style rules covering formatting conventions, immutability preferences, naming guidelines, error handling with Result/throws, and structured concurrency best practices for the ECC harness.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Swift-specific hook rules for the ECC harness, documenting PostToolUse hook patterns and a warning about Swift hook limitations compared to other language runtimes.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Swift architectural pattern guidelines covering protocol-oriented design, value types, the Actor concurrency model, and dependency injection strategies with references to Swift Evolution proposals.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Swift security rules for the ECC harness covering secret management via Keychain, transport security with App Transport Security enforcement, and input validation requirements.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Swift testing guidelines mandating the Swift Testing framework, test isolation with setUp/tearDown, parameterized test suites, and coverage thresholds for the ECC plugin.
